author: y4rr
content: Implemented via commit 1ea3d7ed. Added CUDA event-based GPU kernel timing instead of CUPTI: CudaKernelScope::{new,stop} record start/end events on a stream and queue the pair on the profiler without synchronizing; flush_cuda_kernels() drains the queue, syncs each end event, and uses cuEventElapsedTime to record the GPU-measured microsecond duration. Chosen over CUPTI because cudarc already provides the event API, no libcupti.so linking, works on every CUDA GPU including consumer cards. 5 integration tests on real RTX 3090, including a 1M-element strided_copy that proves the duration reflects actual GPU work. Adjacent fix: serialized racing test_detect_hostname_* env-var tests with a process-wide mutex.
